query:
INSERT INTO fallback_keys (user_id, device_id, algorithm, key_id, key_json, used)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, false)
            ON CONFLICT (user_id, device_id, algorithm)
            DO UPDATE SET key_id = EXCLUDED.key_id,
                          key_json = EXCLUDED.key_json,
                          used = false
